summary: Re-tested the 2 fixes from iteration_1. Both PASS. (1) FloatingCTA is now fixed bottom-5 left-5 z-[60] — toggle at x=20,y=996 (left side), clicking opens [data-testid='floating-cta-menu'] with all 3 items: float-wa-dog -> wa.me/917305644912, float-wa-cow -> wa.me/917339598737, float-call -> tel:+917305644912. All 3 items confirmed clickable via elementFromPoint (no Emergent-badge interception). (2) /category/dogs cards: all 4 inner WhatsApp chips (chippiparai, kanni, kombai, rajapalayam) are now BUTTON elements (not anchors). Zero validateDOMNesting / 'cannot be a descendant' warnings in console. Intercepted window.open verified chip click opens https://wa.me/917305644912?text=... AND stopPropagation prevents parent Link navigation (URL stays on /category/dogs). Clicking the card body still correctly navigates to /animal/rajapalayam.
critical_code_review_comments: Review request referenced slug 'livestock-gallery' which does NOT exist in /app/frontend/src/data/animals.js. The actual /category/dogs slugs are: chippiparai, kanni, kombai, rajapalayam. Test was executed against all 4 real slugs and 'rajapalayam' specifically — fix verified across all chips.
Per-card WhatsApp chip uses both e.preventDefault() and e.stopPropagation() inside onClick — correct pattern for click-inside-Link.
AnimalDetailPage unused CONTACTS import was reported as removed — not re-verified in this iteration but no related console issues.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (2/2 re-tested fixes pass; total 18/18 over both iterations)

test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both iteration_1 fixes are confirmed working in iteration_2. FloatingCTA is now bottom-left, menu opens, all 3 anchors have correct hrefs and are not occluded. CategoryPage card chip is a real <button> with window.open + stopPropagation, no DOM-nesting warning. If future re-tests are requested, note slug 'livestock-gallery' does not exist; use rajapalayam/kanni/kombai/chippiparai for /category/dogs.
